description: Master table for domain categories. Each domain groups roles, capabilities, and learning steps into a business or knowledge context.

sample_records.name: Healthcare Technology
sample_records.description: Domain covering healthcare workflows, systems, and digital health operations.

sample_records.name: Education Technology
sample_records.description: Domain covering learning platforms, curriculum systems, and learner operations.

sample_records.name: Retail Operations
sample_records.description: Domain covering store operations, customer service, inventory, and retail workflows.

sample_records.name: Financial Services
sample_records.description: Domain covering banking, payments, compliance, and financial operations.
